title: Fly Me To The Moon Should be the ED theme for FINAL
display_title: Fly Me To The Moon Should be the ED theme for FINAL
wikitext:
[]: 'Fly Me To The Moon' Should be the ED theme for FINAL             Quote Post by Dataprime » Mon Dec 22, 2014 12:17 pm Fly me to the the moon has become part of Evangelion culture and has been for some time now. While obviously not an original song made for the show; I can't help to think about Eva every time it plays on the radio or even in other movies. At least for me it would a perfect way to send off these movies and a nice little tie in to the series (like that hasn't been done before, right ) What are your thoughts on this? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Mon Dec 22, 2014 12:20 pm As much as i adore this song..........nah, if fly me to the moon took the place of any rebuild movie we would have the two amazing versions of beautiful world and we may not have sakura nagashi, i would prefer a new song.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Dec 22, 2014 12:33 pm Something inside me really wants to keep FMttM for NGE. Sure, I would appreciate the nod to it if it were to show up in Eva Shin's credits, but it would all feel better just to have FMttM stick with NGE, and to have NTE to continue to break Eva as it's been doing so far.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Dec 22, 2014 12:34 pm "Fly me to the moon" no longer fits thematically, anyway. One of the proposed endings to EoE was to have Eva-01 land on the moon instead of float away into distant space. I'm going to stretch things, but I'd guess that was why the song was chosen in the first place - the association of Rei with the moon, as a presence to watch over humanity, as a sign that mankind isn't alone in the universe. Now, whatever ending 4.0 gets has to reflect the multiple impacts that have gone on in the series. Third and fourth impacts were transformative events for Shinji. Assuming that the Final impact meant in the teaser happens as announced (rather than being flushed out of the script), things will come to a conclusion for Shinji's story on Earth. The ending song for the next movie will most likely reflect the ending of Shinji's journey for love on Earth, rather than about leaving the Earth for other worlds.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Dec 22, 2014 4:07 pm ^ Also, there's no need to fly for the Moon anymore, since now it's hanging on Earth's lower atmosphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Dec 22, 2014 4:25 pm We already have Utada's Fly Me to the Moon 2007 mix for 1.0 and 2.0 trailers , I think that's enough. Whatever song Utada will write and sing for FINAL will fit, I'm sure. Fun fact: She barely knew about 3.0's plot when penning the lyrics for Sakura Nagashi .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 22, 2014 4:45 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: She barely knew about 3.0's plot when penning the lyrics for Sakura Nagashi .

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Dec 22, 2014 4:58 pm That too. I just thought it's funny she didn't know much about the plot.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Mon Dec 22, 2014 5:14 pm I agree. I always wanted to hear it in Rebuild and there was a time when i was 100% positive it could happen [url]https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ad2EvbAYfsk[/url] Very good trailer and the song fits perfectly.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Mon Dec 22, 2014 6:49 pm Who says there's gonna be an ED theme for final?

[]:             Quote Post by LukeMM95 » Tue Dec 23, 2014 3:33 pm I wouldn't mind if it appeared briefly, just as a little nod to NGE. Like maybe have Shinji or one of the other characters listen to an old recording of the song while we get a montage of apocalyptic imagery.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Dec 23, 2014 4:32 pm I don't think I'd be surprised if the song made it into Shin at some point, but I'd prefer to hear an original song for the credits. I think whatever Khara makes will be a better fit than Fly Me to the Moon, despite the callback to NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Dec 24, 2014 4:38 am Never mind FMTTM, I want Cruel Angel's Thesis! Za~ngoku no te n shi no te n sei~~

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Dec 24, 2014 4:41 am ^Yes, yes! Do you think it should be the classic version, the 2009 version or a new version altogether? I'm hoping for something soft and subdued like KST or a slower version of Fly Me to the Moon myself, so maybe something like this might be nice.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Dec 24, 2014 5:03 am It depends, how the movie ends, but I could see a piano version or string version fading into the credits sung by Hikaru happening. Also a slow orchestral version could be nice too. (yes, if there's a happy ending, why not some kitsch too? it's fan service evangelion anyways.)

[]:             Quote Post by Jäeger » Wed Dec 24, 2014 5:45 am robersora wrote: Never mind FMTTM, I want Cruel Angel's Thesis! Za~ngoku no te n shi no te n sei~~

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Tue Dec 30, 2014 4:20 am If anything they should put in a Cruel Angel's Thesis for Final. I haven't seen any of the rebuild movies yet. But, I'm disappointed that Sailor Moon Crystal came out and they replaced Moonlight Densetsu with Moon Pride. To me whenever I think Sailor Moon I think of Moonlight Densetsu, a classic opening that represents the show. And a Cruel Angel's Thesis represents Eva.

[]: Re: 'Fly Me To The Moon' Should be the ED theme for FINAL             Quote Post by KurisuNimii » Sun Jul 26, 2020 7:36 pm first i was thinking of Cruel angel thesis play in the new movie.. now that i want it, but it depends of the plot

[]: Re:             Quote Post by KurisuNimii » Sun Jul 26, 2020 7:38 pm Princess Asuka wrote: If anything they should put in a Cruel Angel's Thesis for Final. I haven't seen any of the rebuild movies yet. But, I'm disappointed that Sailor Moon Crystal came out and they replaced Moonlight Densetsu with Moon Pride. To me whenever I think Sailor Moon I think of Moonlight Densetsu, a classic opening that represents the show. And a Cruel Angel's Thesis represents Eva.
